options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -cellInstanceColor
options.description: stream out the instance based color. The instance mask shift is honored in streamOut. When the option is on and -merge option is used, the merged gds files with mask shift suffix must be provided through option -merge.

options.name: -cellMasterColor
options.description: stream out the cell based color from innovus color engine.

options.name: -cellNameUserPrefix
options.description: Add a prefix to ALL cell names being written out, use user specified prefix can avoid potential conflict when integrating different macros, which potentially 2 different cells (in 2 different libraries) with the same name.

options.name: -cellNameUserSuffix
options.description: Instead of appending color pattern to normal cell names, use user specified suffix. This applies to fixed color shift (flip) pattern only. i.e., only single shift (flip) pattern applied to the design.

options.name: -check_map_file
options.description: Check the specified map file. If the objects existed in innovus, but the objects have no objects mapping in map file, print the missed objects mapping and missed objects in log file, only the main objects mapping are checked by the option.

options.name: -ignoreFixedMask
options.description: Ignore macro FIXEDMASK keywords, enable color flip function.

options.name: -labelAllPinShape
options.description: If true, label pin name to its all shapes.

options.name: -mergeAppend
options.description: Append cell color information in current design to cell geometries that are from merging files. This option is for TSMC 10nm fixed-mask design. It is exclusive with -ignoreInstanceColor and -ignoreInstanceCCEColor, it will set those two options to false automatically when it is set to true.

options.name: -noPinLabelOnNets
options.description: Do not label pin text on specified nets.

options.name: -oasisCompression
options.description: CBLOCK compression is partial-selective encryption technology uses OASIS CBLOCK records to encrypt arbitrarily encapsulated sets of data records within an OASIS layout file. REPETITION compression supports an 'array' of cell placements, geometries, or text elements, instead of write each the element separate only different in position, this can save duplicate information for an OASIS layout file size.

options.name: -oasisLayerName
options.description: Support LAYERNAME in OASIS file.

options.name: -oasisSCellOffset
options.description: Include cell offset table to declare the byte offset from the beginning of the file (byte 0) to where the corresponding CELL record appears in the file.

options.name: -pinTextOrientation
options.description: Output pin name on the boundary of design to improve readability.

options.name: -remove_short_metal_within_cell_boundary
options.description: The trim metal short inside FTV_cell_list should be cut off.

options.name: -removeNets
options.description: Don't output nets in the list.

options.name: -SEcompatible
options.description: Output instance only is FOREIGN is specified.

options.name: -SEvianames
options.description: Determines the naming convention used for vias declared in the LEF file.

options.name: -snapToMGrid
options.description: Snap net's wire to manufacture grid if it is not.

options.name: -specifyViaName
options.description: Specifies the naming convention that the streamOut command uses for via cells declared in the DEF file.

options.name: -streamConvertRectToPath
options.description: When enabled, DEF SPECIALNETS path/rect and FILLS shapes are converted to GDSII/stream PATH data instead of BOUNDARY data. Conversion to path data can result in significantly smaller output database when there are many rectangle shapes (example: after metal fill is included).

options.name: -streamVersion
options.description: Specify GDSII version to output.

options.name: -supportPathType4
options.description: If false, converts PATHTYPE4 to PATHTYPE0.

options.name: -textSize
options.description: Changes the size of the text used in the text labels.

options.name: -uniquifyCellNamesPrefix
options.description: Adds a prefix, instead of a suffix, to uniquified cell names.

options.name: -virtualConnection
options.description: Specifies whether a colon (:) label is appended to pin names for DEF pins with the .extraN syntax and to LEF pins with multiple ports (if -outputMacros is specified for LEF pin ports that have disjoint shapes).

options.name: -quiet
options.description: Displays the current settings in Tcl list format only

options.name: -nonDefault
options.description: Displays the current settings which are not default settings
